title: OpenBudget Internal Chapter Mirror
description: Schema for our mirrored kapitola.json stored in the main GitLab snippet. Extends the official schema with a stable internal iid identifier.

iid.description: OpenBudget-internal stable identifier. Never changes, even when the state reassigns the chapter's id.

id.description: State-assigned chapter identifier (may change due to political renumbering).

name.description: Full English name of the ministry or government body.

startDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this chapter became active.

endDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this chapter expired, or '9999-12-31' if still active.

expired.description: True when the chapter has been dissolved, merged, or disappeared from the official API.
